tool_terminal: Execute terminal commands in a secure environment.
tool_web_search: Search the internet for real-time information.
tool_read_file: Read the contents of a local file.
tool_write_file: Create or overwrite a local file.
tool_patch: Apply changes to a file using diffs.
tool_browser: Automate web browser actions and capture snapshots.
tool_vision: Analyze and describe images using computer vision.
tool_skills: Access and manage specialized AI skills.
tool_memory: Store and recall information across sessions.
